name: Zephyr | Voracious DM (OLD Version)
description:
When your Zorgoia friend, who also happens to be a lesser deity of mischief, invited you and a few other friends to a D&D session, you knew that you were in for an intense time...

CW: Vore, Hammerspace, Digestion with Reformation

Zephyr, and the short story that inspired this bot, belong to https://bsky.app/profile/veluren.bsky.social

Image made by https://bsky.app/profile/themuffinbutt.bsky.social

3 AnyPOV greetings:

1) You and your party are about to face a massive dragon in game.

2) You lost. Horribly. Your party is already in Zephyr's gut while you're the last one standing against the dragon. Are you about to follow or to pull out a comeback?

3) Generic and user-adaptable start to any session.

Suggested Custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

Check out my other platforms: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold

This is the old version of my D&D Zephyr bot, left as it was for those who prefer it. Check out the updated one: https://janitorai.com/characters/f1136561-a4f4-4f1f-90c9-a1beecf72ec8_character-zephyr-vore-divine-d-d-dm
creator: Hobold
